popularStory.headline: Cockayne Families
popularStory.description:
Is there another Old Derbshire family with such memorabilia for the historian, with so many vicissitudes and so many dramatic episodes, as the Cokaynes? 

Derbyshire provides much of the finest scener …

zh.Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾阿希布恩
zh.Ashbourne, Derby, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾阿希布恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Cokayne於1220年2月出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾阿希布恩時，他的父親William de Cokayne36歲，母親Alice d'Aubigny32歲。他與Elizabeth of Ashbourne結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1300年在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩享年81歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Cokayne于1220年2月出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾阿希布恩时，他的父亲William de Cokayne36岁，母亲Alice d'Aubigny32岁。他与Elizabeth of Ashbourne结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1300年在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩享年81岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cokayne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cockayne
meanings: English (Midlands and Yorkshire): nickname for a dreamer, from Middle English cokayne ‘cloud-cuckooland’, the name of an imaginary paradise (Old French (pays de) cocaigne, from Middle Low German kōkenje, a diminutive of kōke ‘cake’, since in this land the houses were thought to be made of cake). It may also be a variant of Cocking or from the unflattering Middle English nickname cokin (Old French coquin) ‘disreputable person’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Cokayne was born in February 1220, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Cokayne, was 36 and his mother, Alice d'Aubigny, was 32. He married Elizabeth of Ashbourne. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1300, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Cokayne est né en février 1220, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Cokayne, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alice d'Aubigny, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth of Ashbourne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1300, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Cokayne im Februar 1220 in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Cokayne 36 und seine Mutter Alice d'Aubigny 32. Er hat Elizabeth of Ashbourne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1300 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Cokayne è nato il nel febbraio 1220 nel Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Cokayne, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Alice d'Aubigny, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth of Ashbourne. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1300, nel Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England.

ja.Ashbourne, Derby, England: イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルン
ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Cokayneが1220年2月にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンで生まれた時，父William de Cokayneは36歳，母Alice d'Aubignyは32歳であった。Elizabeth of Ashbourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1300年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンで81歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Cokayne(이)가 1220년 2월 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 애스h보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Cokayne(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice d'Aubigny(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Elizabeth of Ashbourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1300년 영국 더비실르 애스h보우른에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 애스h보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Cokayne nasceu em fevereiro de 1220, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Cokayne, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alice d'Aubigny, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth of Ashbourne. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1300, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Cokayne родился февраль 1220 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Cokayne было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice d'Aubigny, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth of Ashbourne. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1300 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Cokayne nació en febrero de 1220, en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Cokayne, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Alice d'Aubigny, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Elizabeth of Ashbourne. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1300, en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
